subject: Contract Law
module: Consumer Protection and Sale of Goods

lessons.title: Consumer Rights Act 2022: Sale of Goods
lessons.description: The core principle is this. Where a trader sells goods to a consumer, the Consumer Rights Act 2022 imposes statutory conformity obligations on the trader and grants the consumer a tiered set of remedies.

lessons.title: Consumer Rights Act 2022: Digital Content and Services
lessons.description: First, the definitions in section 2. Digital content means data produced and supplied in digital form — digital games, software, digital music, digital films, e-books.

lessons.title: Unfair Contract Terms
lessons.description: The history is important for any essay question in this area.
